steps.title: Substitute one expression
steps.content:
Let $u$ represent the expression the question asks for:
$$u=5-7x$$
Then the equation becomes
$$8u+3=7u+17$$

steps.title: Solve for the expression
steps.content: Move the $u$ terms to one side and the constants to the other: $$8u+3=7u+17$$ $$u+3=17$$ $$u=14$$ Since $u=5-7x$, the value of the requested expression is $14$. The answer is D.
